Class StreamingDatabase

java.lang.Object
database.StreamingDatabase
public class StreamingDatabase extends Object
Core database manager for the platform.

      Gets the streaming graph instance.

    • insertGenre

      public void insertGenre(Genre genre)
      Inserts a genre into the database.
      Parameters:
      genre - The genre to insert

    • getGenre

      public Genre getGenre(String id)
      Gets a genre from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the genre to get
      Returns:
      The genre with the specified ID

      public void removeGenre(String id)
      Removes a genre from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the genre to remove

    • insertUser

      Inserts a user into the database.

      Gets a user from the database.

      Removes a user from the database.

    • addArtistToContent

      public void addArtistToContent(String contentId, String artistId)
      Links an existing Artist to an existing Content.
      Parameters:
      contentId - The ID of the content
      artistId - The ID of the artist

    • getContentsByGenreId

      public Iterable<Content> getContentsByGenreId(String genreId)
      Returns the contents associated with the specified genre ID.
      Parameters:
      genreId - The ID of the genre to retrieve contents for
      Returns:
      An iterable collection of contents associated with the specified genre ID.

    • editUser

      public void editUser(String id, String name, String region, LocalDate registrationDate)
      Edits a user's information.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the user to edit
      name - The new name of the user
      region - The new region of the user
      registrationDate - The new registration date of the user

    • editArtist

      public void editArtist(String id, String name, String nationality, String gender, LocalDate birthDate)
      Edits an artist's information.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the artist to edit
      name - The new name of the artist
      nationality - The new nationality of the artist
      gender - The new gender of the artist
      birthDate - The new birth date of the artist

    • editGenre

      public void editGenre(String id, String name)
      Edits a genre's information.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the genre to edit
      name - The new name of the genre

    • editContent

      public void editContent(String id, String name, ContentType type, Genre genre, LocalDate releaseDate, int durationMinutes)
      Edits a content's information.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the content to edit
      name - The new name of the content
      type - The new type of the content
      genre - The new genre of the content
      releaseDate - The new release date of the content
      durationMinutes - The new duration of the content in minutes

      Lists all users in the database.
